game_version: Limbus Company (structural facts; the 3 damage types are fixed)

entries.description: One of the three attack damage types. Each unit has a separate resistance to Slash, Pierce, and Blunt, ranging from Fatal (most damage taken) through Weak, Normal, Endure, to Ineffective (least).
